description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single job named compile that runs in the production stage using the aergus/latex Docker image and only triggers on the master branch. In the compile job execute the shell commands: `find . -maxdepth 1 -type f ! -name "*.*" -exec python3 statuto2tex.py "{}" \;`, then `mkdir pdf`, then `cd pdf`, and finally `for i in ../*.tex ; do pdflatex "$i"; pdflatex "$i"; pdflatex "$i"; done`. Publish all generated PDF files matching pdf/*.pdf as job artifacts.
